summary: Frontend-only smoke test of SDR-01 Morse Decoder. All required data-testids present, tabs switch, sliders respond to keyboard (when focusing slider thumb), auto-unit toggles, copy-empty toast appears, clear works, WAV file upload accepted, and file playback transitions capture-status-badge from IDLE to LIVE with waveform/FFT rendering.
passed: App loads at root URL with SDR-01 header, FFT Spectrum panel, Waveform panel, controls aside, Decoded Stream section

All required data-testids present (fft-canvas, wave-canvas, tab-mic, tab-file, mic-start-btn, file-drop-zone, file-input, file-play-btn, pitch-slider, pitch-readout, threshold-slider, threshold-readout, level-bar, wpm-readout, unit-readout, auto-unit-toggle, manual-unit-slider, current-symbol, copy-clipboard-btn, clear-btn, decoded-text-output, signal-status-badge, capture-status-badge)
Tab switching: MIC tab shows mic-start-btn; FILE tab reveals file-drop-zone, file-input, file-play-btn
Pitch slider: 700 Hz -> 900 Hz via ArrowRight on slider thumb (role=slider)
Threshold slider: 140 -> 150 via ArrowRight on slider thumb
Auto unit toggle: label switches between 'Auto unit: ON' and 'Auto unit: OFF'; manual-unit-slider becomes enabled (aria-disabled=false) when OFF
Copy button on empty decoded text shows toast 'Loaded morse_test.wav'-style toast containing 'Nothing to copy yet' as expected
File upload: synthetic 700 Hz WAV loaded; drop zone label shows 'MORSE_TEST.WAV' and success toast 'Loaded morse_test.wav' appears

File playback: clicking file-play-btn changes capture-status-badge from 'IDLE' to 'LIVE'; FFT and waveform render (700 Hz vertical marker visible, waveform line drawing, current-symbol started decoding ('T' visible in stream))
No React/JS console errors during load or interaction
notes: Radix UI sliders require focusing the inner thumb element ([role="slider"]) rather than the root [data-testid] for keyboard ArrowRight to register. This is expected Radix behavior, not a bug.
Microphone end-to-end not tested (headless env limitation, as noted in request).
